title: Implement component layer tests (parts/modules testing)
description: Implement the component layer test module for testing individual server parts and modules including: CPU/processor tests, memory tests, storage subsystem tests, network interface tests, and PCIe device tests. Each component test validates functionality independently.

criteria: CPU tests validate core count, frequency, cache functionality, and instruction set support
Memory tests verify capacity, ECC functionality, and correctable/uncorrectable error handling
Storage tests validate drive detection, SMART attributes, RAID configuration, and IOPS performance
Network tests verify interface enumeration, link status, throughput, and offload capabilities
PCIe tests validate device enumeration, bandwidth, and endpoint functionality
Component tests can run independently or as part of full hardware suite
convergence.verification: Run pytest tests/component/ -v and verify all component tests execute with mock or real hardware

implementation: Implement CpuTests: core_count_validation, frequency_check, cache_test (L1/L2/L3), cpu_instruction_support (SIMD, AES-NI), turbo_boost_verification
Implement MemoryTests: capacity_verification, ecc_support_check, memory_stress_patterns, error_injection_handling, memory_bandwidth_measurement
Implement StorageTests: drive_detection, smart_attribute_check (reallocated sectors, pending errors), raid_config_validation, fio_benchmark_integration, NVMe namespace validation
Implement NetworkTests: interface_enumeration, link_speed_detection (1G/10G/25G/100G), throughput_test (iperf3), offload_capabilities (TSO, checksum), VLAN configuration
Implement PCIeTests: device_enumeration, slot_bandwidth (PCIe gen 3/4/5), endpoint_bar_validation, correctable_error_counting
Create ComponentProbe utility for enumerating components via sysfs, lspci, and system APIs
Implement mock component probes for testing without real hardware
Write comprehensive unit tests for each component module

success_metrics: tests run with mock component API

reference.pattern: Layer protocol from TASK-001, ComponentProbe pattern
